calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2018 Set For Trial On Nov-01-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 608

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-02-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 765tJudge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported. (608)
APPEARANCES:
Appellant/Defendant/Cross-complainant Jilcha Dura Sambi appeared in pro per.
Appellant/Defendant/Cross-complainant BE&JDS, Inc. DBA Comfort Cab appeared, represented by Jilcha Dura Sambi.
Respondent/Plaintiff/Cross-defendant Mohamed Lassoued appeared in pro per.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn. Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles recused himself and the matter is heard before Judge Lynn O'Malley Taylor.

Respondent/Plaintiff/Cross-defendant Mohamed Lassoued testifies on his own behalf.
Appellant/Defendant/Cross-complainant Jilcha Dura Sambi testifies on his own behalf and on behalf of BE&JDS, Inc. DBA Comfort Cab.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Respondent/Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant's Group Exhibit 1: Motor Vehicles for Hire Regulations, booklet, Business Account Activity Transaction Details, Shift Summary Report, "Mohamed's Gate" records, SFGATE article printout, Sheet of calculations, statement, Regulation of Motor Vehicles for Hire, and original retained trial exhibits.
Appellant/Defendant's/Cross-complainant's Group Exhibit A: Computer chip, Letter to Jilcha from Mohamed dated June 18, 2016; waybill; Statements; ramp medallion fees; receipt books; letter from SFMTA; Tripsheet reports, and original retained trial exhibits.
Respondent/Plaintiff/Cross-defendant's and Appellant/Defendant/Cross-complainant's exhibits are retained by the Court.
The matter is taken under submission.
Dept. 608; Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported.
